title: galium anglicum var. divaricatum
intro: Galium anglicum var. divaricatum, also known as the English bedstraw, is a variety of plant that belongs to the bedstraw family (Galium spp.). It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galium anglicum var. divaricatum are said to include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. This plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
